titles_tesim: Clement the Hymnographer, Kanon on Saint Eupraxia
contents_tesim: Clement the Hymnographer, Kanon on Saint Eupraxia
full_text_tesim: Clement the Hymnographer, Kanon on Saint Eupraxia
Each (reconstructed) folio had 28/29 lines of text, with 8 mm between and arranged in a single column

One bifolio of Sin. gr. 966 corresponds to one original folio (61v+56r, 61r+56v), which measured approximately 255x180 mm. The Schriftspiegel is approximately 200x120 mm. The upper margin measures 15 mm (fol. 61r), the outer 40 mm (fol. 61r), the internal one 25 mm (f. 61r), and the lower 50 mm (fol. 56v)
